title: My Son Forged My Signature, Sold My Home, And Lied To Everyone. So I Now Get 40% Of His Pay.
description: I cleaned offices for 15 years to pay off his medical school loans, trusting his promise that I'd live with him after residency. Then he forged my signature, filed a restraining order, and sold my home. Now I garnish 40% of his salary and mail him a holiday card from my paid-off cottage every year. #FamilyBetrayal #RevengeStory #Karma
thumb_text: I GARNISH HIS PAYCHECK AND SEND HIM HOLIDAY CARDS

thumb_lines.text: I CLEANED OFFICES FOR 15 YEARS TO PAY HIS LOANS
